title: Count Vowels and Consonants
statement:
Write a Python program that reads a string from input and prints the count of vowels and consonants on separate lines.

Output format:
```
Vowels: <count>
Consonants: <count>
```

Ignore spaces and non-alphabetic characters. Treat both upper and lower case letters equally.
starter_code:
s = input().strip()

vowels = 0
consonants = 0

# Write your solution here

print(f"Vowels: {vowels}")
print(f"Consonants: {consonants}")
constraints: Vowels are: a, e, i, o, u (case-insensitive)
Ignore spaces, digits, and special characters
